description: 10 tasks with known correct priority ordering for Priority Ranker tests (PRI-01 to PRI-12). expected_rank_range is [min, max] inclusive.

tasks.name: Resolve vendor delay for NGIS Phase 3 network equipment
tasks.rationale: Critical risk, 2 rollovers, blocks 3 tasks, imminent deadline

tasks.name: Submit ITSG-33 SA&A documentation to TBS audit office
tasks.rationale: Compliance risk, regulatory deadline, blocks migration go-live

tasks.name: Present budget revision request to Director for approval
tasks.rationale: High financial risk, Director attention, near deadline

tasks.name: Initiate knowledge transfer for AD migration expert departure
tasks.rationale: High resource risk, no deadline but blocks 4 tasks (tricky case)

tasks.name: Complete UAT test plan and distribute to stakeholders
tasks.rationale: Near deadline, medium risk, moderate priority

tasks.name: Assess impact of vendor delay on Site A migration cutover
tasks.rationale: Imminent deadline, medium risk, informs steering committee

tasks.name: Prepare Treasury Board submission for GC-Cloud Wave 4
tasks.rationale: Medium priority, regulatory deadline but further out

tasks.name: Evaluate alternative network equipment suppliers
tasks.rationale: No deadline but rollover_count=3 (chronic blocker flag, tricky case)

tasks.name: Draft end-user communication plan for data centre migration
tasks.rationale: Low risk, distant deadline, no dependencies

tasks.name: Update project charter formatting and version number
tasks.rationale: Administrative, no risk, distant deadline, no impact

context.artifacts_summary: Recent artifacts include: vendor delay email (March 2), TBS compliance finding email (March 5), sprint review minutes (March 3), budget revision request (March 3), and governance committee notes (March 4). Director has been briefed on NGIS vendor delay and ITSG-33 finding.

active_risks.description: Vendor delivery delayed by 2 weeks — threatens NGIS Phase 3 migration timeline
ITSG-33 IA-5 compliance finding — PAW architecture missing from SA&A
Key AD migration expert potential departure — single point of failure
